summary: Completed comprehensive testing of enhanced Vision-Based Smart Classroom Environment Monitoring System. Successfully tested all new features: batch analysis, CSV/PDF export, alerts system with resolution, settings page, and email notification infrastructure. Backend APIs (100% success rate, 13/13 tests passed), frontend functionality, and all enhanced integrations working correctly.

design_issues.issue: React hydration warnings in console about <tr> elements wrapped in <span>
design_issues.impact: Non-critical - UI functions correctly but shows console warnings

passed_tests: All 13 enhanced API endpoints responding correctly (100% success rate)
NEW: Batch analysis endpoint processing multiple classroom images successfully
NEW: CSV export endpoint generating downloadable reports
NEW: PDF export endpoint generating formatted reports with tables
NEW: Alerts system with filtering (unresolved/resolved/all) working
NEW: Alert resolution functionality tested and working
NEW: Settings endpoints (GET/POST) for threshold and email configuration
NEW: Active alerts count integration in dashboard stats
Enhanced dashboard with 5 stats cards including new 'Active Alerts' card
Batch analysis mode toggle and multi-file upload functionality
Alert badge counter in navigation sidebar with real-time updates
Settings page with cleanliness threshold, email recipients, and monitoring toggle
Settings save functionality with form validation
Navigation between all 5 pages (Dashboard, Analyze, History, Alerts, Settings)
Export buttons on dashboard triggering actual file downloads
Alert filter dropdown with three options working correctly
Alert resolution buttons functional and updating state
Email notification infrastructure configured (works without Resend API key)
All previous features (single image analysis, dashboard, history) still functional
Frontend-backend integration seamless for all enhanced features
